live_during_compute_and_prefetch.current_A_B_fragments_FA_FB: 64 (live until the WMMA COMPLETES -- RDNA3 WAR hazard, cannot overwrite at issue)

dead_during_compute.coop_load_temps_CTA_CTB: 32 (indices 202-233) -- reusable for prefetch (this IS the pool; PLRA already reuses them for the A-side)

A_side_pool_already_shipped: PLRA (dead-coop-temp A-prefetch) = +9-11%, in the default config -- the achievable pool gain is ALREADY captured

smaller_tile_finding.WM4xWN2_PLRAB: BUILDS (acc floor halves) but detector=PHASED (0/6 global loads in span) -- PLRAB pipelines the SUBSTEP LDS reads, not the BLOCK global loads; and smaller N-tile trades occupancy (Phase-B-closed for well-occupied down/qo)

two_pipeline_levels: DBUF = block-level (global loads in span, detector PIPELINED, but regresses via LDS-doubling); PLRA/PLRAB = substep-level (ds reads in span, detector PHASED on globals). Tensile does BOTH (3/4 global + 76/76 ds in span); matching both exceeds RDNA3 256-VGPR at the occupancy-optimal tile.
